pi_items.source: Web search confirmed AA100 is a real American Airlines flight operating JFK-LHR route, with 6x weekly schedule. Verified via FlightAware, FlightRadar24, and FlightStats.

task.json description states 'Change the date selector from Today to Yesterday (the day before the current device date)'. setup_task.sh and verifier.py both reference yesterday's date calculation. -1 offset is the correct representation.

task.json description explicitly states 'save it to /sdcard/past_flight_result.png'. setup_task.sh deletes this path at line 10. export_result.sh checks for this exact path at line 13 (OUTPUT_PATH variable). All scripts are consistent.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves searching for American Airlines flight AA100 (a real flight operating JFK-LHR, 6 times weekly per live flight tracking data) on the previous day using a Flight Crew View app. The app is a simulated/test Android application (com.robert.fcView) with likely pre-loaded or synthetic flight data. The agent must locate the flight search feature, enter AA100, modify the date selector from today to yesterday, and capture a screenshot to /sdcard/past_flight_result.png.
